description:
-excavation of dirt on front corner of home under master toilet. There is a 10¿ belly in the line from the toilet riser to the sewer tap where it catches the rest of the bathroom. Landscaping and yard work is not included. .
-once we have removed the belly we will be setting hangers and running new piping for master toilet. Setting piping to correct fall so issue is far less likely to come back up in the future. All work done on tunnel repair has a 5 year Parts and labor warranty. 
-we will also be having to excavate on the left side of home to access failed sewer check valve in front yard. 
-we will be replacing check valve with a new check valve. We will be also installing new valve box covers for easy access in the future. This new check valve will have a 5 year P&L warranty 
-we will also be calling for an engineer letter to ensure structural integrity of home. This is included in price. 
-once all the work is done we will backfill the trench and haul off excess dirt if applicable.
